descriptionShort: Profile of coach Orland Kurtenbach's return to coaching after nine years away, now leading Richmond Sockeyes in Abbott Cup playoff series against Humboldt.
descriptionLong: Orland Kurtenbach, former Vancouver Canucks head coach, has returned to hockey coaching after nine years away to lead the Richmond Sockeyes of the BCJHL. The 50-year-old Cudworth native discusses rediscovering his love for the game and coaching junior players. The Sockeyes lead the Humboldt Broncos 2-1 in the Abbott Cup best-of-seven series, with game four scheduled in Richmond.

attribution.headline: Kurtenbach enjoys return to coaching with Richmond Sockeyes
